新店开业当天，却被一个老道带往长生剑宗，还多了一个容貌绝美又清绝出尘的师姐。
师姐负责教导他修仙炼剑，只是怎么隐约有点不对。
“师姐，练气是什么？”
“练气就是将天地间无主的灵气吸收到体内。”
“筑基呢？”
“将体内的灵气，压缩成液态，又压缩成固态，成为日后修炼的基础。”
“金丹呢？”
“金丹就是将压缩成固态球体的灵气加速旋转，随后因为天地间的某种规则，它的体积就会坍塌。坍塌到极限半径，但又不形成黑洞，就可以称为金丹了。”
……师姐，仙真是这么修的吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/09b0b7e2b00b41957652290bb5c54440~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小星璇","author_id":"","book_id":"7593702385977936958","book_name":"师姐，仙真的是这么修的吗？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5228人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7593703815157662270","read_count":"5228","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"122816"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,武侠,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/09b0b7e2b00b41957652290bb5c54440~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382707&x-signature=KKT0QfkL39eidvW0tFFSboVMyIc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1161564643920974","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"31"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032300582757086C22EF1B693BE9DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4060,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_au
